Effect: Bear Support Benefit.name: 效果：熊-支援增益 Bear Support Benefit
Effect: Bear Support Benefit.description:
受@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-animal-companions.AC-Support.Item.AvDlo1mgxXd7ZA8W]影响

每次你以打击命中熊触及范围内的生物时，这名生物会受到来自于熊的1d8点挥砍伤害。

Effect: Blood Feast.name: 效果：血宴 Blood Feast
Effect: Blood Feast.description:
受@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-animal-companions.AC-Advanced-Maneuvers.Item.cVrW2GGLVpydj8h5]影响

你的吸血野兽伙伴获得等同于你等级一半数值的临时生命值

Effect: Defensive Curl (Hermit Krait).name: 效果：防御卷曲（隐蛇） Defensive Curl (Hermit Krait)
Effect: Defensive Curl (Hermit Krait).description:
受@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-animal-companions.AC-Advanced-Maneuvers.Item.wQewsJLOsfucMXyB]影响

AC获得+2环境加值，并且在假装成普通贝壳的检定中获得+4环境加值。在隐蛇处于防御卷曲状态时，任何用近战无武装攻击命中它的生物，会受到2d6点持续毒素伤害

Effect: Antelope Support Benefit.name: 效果：羚羊-支援增益 Antelope Support Benefit
Effect: Antelope Support Benefit.description:
效果来自@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-animal-companions.AC-Support.Item.yIB4qKV5sqcXlOmB]

你对羚羊触及范围内的生物造成伤害的打击会额外造成1d6点持续流血伤害

Effect: Badger Rage.name: 效果：獾之狂暴 Badger Rage
Effect: Badger Rage.description:
受@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-animal-companions.AC-Advanced-Maneuvers.Item.HLD4JW6SUn5Oy8C9]影响

啃咬攻击造成4点额外伤害，爪抓攻击造成2点额外伤害。AC承受–1减值。

Effect: Bat Support Benefit.name: 效果：蝙蝠-支援增益 Bat Support Benefit
Effect: Bat Support Benefit.description:
受@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-animal-companions.AC-Support.Item.Aj7JWFXIbF3qmvSX]影响

攻击掷骰上承受-1环境减值。

Effect: Beetle Support Benefit.name: 效果：甲虫-支援增益 Beetle Support Benefit
Effect: Beetle Support Benefit.description:
受@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-animal-companions.AC-Support.Item.mFTzDCqNL5EdwlGm]影响

你的打击如果造成伤害，可以让目标陷入@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Off-Guard]直到你的下一回合结束，或让目标被推离甲虫5尺（强迫移动）。由目标来选择两种效果中的其中之一。

Effect: Bird Support Benefit.name: 效果：鸟-支援增益 Bird Support Benefit
Effect: Bird Support Benefit.description:
受@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-animal-companions.AC-Support.Item.7rhcqwMDt2xqnI1N]影响

你的打击在伤害一名位于你的鸟威胁范围内的生物时，还会造成1d4点持续流血伤害，这个目标直到流血伤害被移除前都会陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]

Effect: Boar Support Benefit.name: 效果：野猪-支援增益 Boar Support Benefit
Effect: Boar Support Benefit.description:
受@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-animal-companions.AC-Support.Item.8re1d4lM0Dn4sLto]影响

你对野猪触及范围内生物造成伤害的打击还将造成1d6持续流血伤害。

Effect: Capybara Support Benefit.name: 效果：水豚-支援增益 Capybara Support Benefit
Effect: Capybara Support Benefit.description:
受@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-animal-companions.AC-Support.Item.Fl1VEpYhmScEEon8]影响

你在对位于水豚触及范围内的敌人的下一次打击，攻击骰获得+1环境加值。

Effect: Cat Support Benefit.name: 效果：猫-支援增益 Cat Support Benefit
Effect: Cat Support Benefit.description:
受@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-animal-companions.AC-Support.Item.HCQXxqMtH81jE1W5]影响

你对猫触及范围内敌人造成伤害的打击会使目标陷入@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Off-Guard]，直到你下回合结束。对措手不及的目标造成1d4点额外精准伤害。

Effect: Cave Gecko Support Benefit.name: 效果：洞穴壁虎-支援增益 Cave Gecko Support Benefit
Effect: Cave Gecko Support Benefit.description:
受@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-animal-companions.AC-Support.Item.nDUwRm0TOtc2EX0O]影响

如果你对对手尝试进行卸武，推撞或是摔绊且结果为大失败，你将转而得到失败的结果。

Effect: Crocodile Support Benefit.name: 效果：鳄鱼-支援增益 Crocodile Support Benefit
Effect: Crocodile Support Benefit.description:
受@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-animal-companions.AC-Support.Item.yfjeiYMC27YGgoGW]影响

速度上承受–10尺环境减值，且不能飞行

Effect: Defensive Curl.name: 效果：防御卷曲 Defensive Curl
Effect: Defensive Curl.description:
受@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-animal-companions.AC-Advanced-Maneuvers.Item.pMPtswKNokDNyYR2]影响

AC获得+2环境加值，并且任何用近战无武装攻击处于防御卷曲状态的生物，会受到2d6点持续流血伤害

Effect: Draft Lizard Support Benefit.name: 效果：驮蜥-支援增益 Draft Lizard Support Benefit
Effect: Draft Lizard Support Benefit.description:
受@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-animal-companions.AC-Support.Item.g3Wol5lNhQdxqs7t]影响

你在下次打击处于你驮蜥触及范围内一个敌人时，在攻击骰上获得+1环境加值。

Effect: Retreat (Rider).name: 效果：撤退（骑手）Retreat (Rider)
Effect: Retreat (Rider).description:
效果来自@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-animal-companions.AC-Advanced-Maneuvers.Item.SkVl3yomdYZoS7Hx]或@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-animal-companions.AC-Advanced-Maneuvers.Item.R2RNXJH06UhSMmzp]

你的AC在此移动触发的反应中获得+2环境加值。

Effect: Spiked Bunker.name: 效果：针刺外壳 Spiked Bunker
Effect: Spiked Bunker.description:
受@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-animal-companions.AC-Advanced-Maneuvers.Item.oyNZpuQ6EU3prvo2]影响

AC获得+2环境加值。对于处于针刺外壳状态下的金元素，任何使用近战无武装攻击命中它的生物都会受到2d6点穿刺伤害（如果你的金元素是特化动物伙伴则为3d6）

Effect: Wyvern Support Benefit.name: 效果：双足飞龙-支援增益 Wyvern Support Benefit

受@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-animal-companions.AC-Support.Item.3ZYwTYI4ORCz4xQg]影响

你打击伤害的生物若处于你的双足飞龙的触及之内，则还会造成1d6点持续毒素伤害。

Effect: Ape Support Benefit.description:
受@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-animal-companions.AC-Support.Item.Qm0iwIYyy2gbnYXe]影响

如果你命中并伤害一个位于猿伙伴触及范围的生物，该生物陷入@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Frightened]{惊惧 Frightened 1}。

Effect: Flying Squirrel Support Benefit.name: Effect: Flying Squirrel Support Benefit (Penalty)
Effect: Flying Squirrel Support Benefit.description:
Granted by @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-animal-companions.AC-Support.Item.V2kspaYOoLbHV5vb]{Flying Squirrel Support Benefit}

You take a –10-foot circumstance penalty to your Speeds.

Effect: Ghost Support Benefit.name: 效果：幽灵-支援增益 Ghost Support Benefit
Effect: Ghost Support Benefit.description:
受@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-animal-companions.AC-Support.Item.4kkcfQdHAb4YTVNw]影响

如果你命中并对你幽灵触及范围内的生物造成伤害，该生物会陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]。

Effect: Hyena Support Benefit.name: Effect: Hyena Support Benefit
Effect: Hyena Support Benefit.description:
Granted by @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-animal-companions.AC-Support.Item.wlh1poSMLK9wk2Nw]{Hyena Support Benefit}

When you hit a creature in the hyena's reach with a Strike, the creature becomes Frightened 1.

Effect: Monitor Lizard Support Benefit (.name: Effect: Monitor Lizard Support Benefit (Penalty)
Effect: Monitor Lizard Support Benefit (.description:
Granted by @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-animal-companions.AC-Support.Item.2Jaz98WiQMNnqKCD]{Monitor Lizard Support Benefit}

If you attempt an action with the manipulate trait, you must attempt a DC 5 Flat Check. On a failure, the action is disrupted.

Effect: Moth Support Benefit (Penalty).name: 效果：飞蛾-支援增益（减值）Moth Support Benefit (Penalty)
Effect: Moth Support Benefit (Penalty).description:
受@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-animal-companions.AC-Support.Item.9Y5QKMvy0KsliE29]影响

如果你以打击伤害一个对你隐蔽或藏匿、且位于飞蛾触及范围内的敌人，则命中隐蔽生物的纯骰检定DC仅为3，命中藏匿敌人的纯骰检定DC仅为9。

Effect: Pangolin Support Benefit.description:
受@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-animal-companions.AC-Support.Item.QiQvx7jtfrkGnf13]影响

你对穿山甲触及范围内生物造成伤害的打击还将造成持续流血伤害。
Effect: Pangolin Support Benefit.name: 效果：穿山甲-支援增益 Pangolin Support Benefit

Effect: Ravenous Drake Support Benefit.name: Effect: Ravenous Drake Support Benefit
Effect: Ravenous Drake Support Benefit.description:
Granted by @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-animal-companions.AC-Support.Item.uIOdChoT35s5BIzd]{Ravenous Drake Support Benefit}

You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to any Athletics check to Disarm, Reposition, Shove, or Trip to an opponent adjacent to your ravenous drake.

Effect: Reckless Attack.name: 效果：鲁莽攻击 Reckless Attack
Effect: Reckless Attack.description:
受@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-animal-companions.AC-Features.Item.yYN5lYVfJVofjR0k]影响

你的下一次攻击掷骰获得+1环境加值。

Effect: Riding Tarantula Support Benefit.name: Effect: Riding Tarantula Support Benefit (Penalty)
Effect: Riding Tarantula Support Benefit.description:
Granted by @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-animal-companions.AC-Support.Item.NKgFIZQYkL3bb6xn]{Riding Tarantula Support Benefit}

The target must succeed at a @Check[type:flat|dc:5] whenever it takes a concentrate action or that action is lost.

Effect: Roc Support Benefit.name: 效果：覆天雕-支援增益 Roc Support Benefit
Effect: Roc Support Benefit.description:
受@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-animal-companions.AC-Support.Item.R0e3jHpB7nTzIUPm]影响

受@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-animal-companions.AC-Support.Item.YsLLV4J7L6fgzTXf]影响

Effect: Shotalashu Support Benefit.name: 效果：念力巨蜥-支援增益 Shotalashu Support Benefit
Effect: Shotalashu Support Benefit.description:
受@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-animal-companions.AC-Support.Item.ufAZJqCN7ZOBhMSJ]影响

Granted by @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-animal-companions.AC-Support.Item.bEkXle5FLNxnp3IE]{Skeletal Bird of Prey Support Benefit}

When you damage a creature in the bird's reach with a Strike, that creature becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1}.

Effect: Skeletal Constrictor Support Ben.name: Effect: Skeletal Constrictor Support Benefit
Effect: Skeletal Constrictor Support Ben.description:
Granted by @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-animal-companions.AC-Support.Item.Si13B4VFANZN8mi1]{Skeletal Constrictor Support Benefit}

Your Strikes that deal damage to the chosen creature make the target @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard}.

Effect: Skeletal Mount Support Benefit.name: 效果：骷髅坐骑-支援增益 Skeletal Mount Support Benefit
Effect: Skeletal Mount Support Benefit.description:
受@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-animal-companions.AC-Support.Item.CKMQC3zu1XoGjeNd]影响

如果你骑乘你的骷髅坐骑并在你攻击前的动作中移动至少10尺，任何被攻击伤害到的生物都会陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{惊惧 Frightened 1}，如果攻击是重击则陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{惊惧 Frightened 2}。

Effect: Skeletal Servant Support Benefit.name: 效果：骷髅侍从-支援增益 Skeletal Servant Support Benefit
Effect: Skeletal Servant Support Benefit.description:
受@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-animal-companions.AC-Support.Item.bHaJZSm7SakAsk00]影响

当你的打击命中你的侍从触及范围内一个生物并造成伤害时，该目标会陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]。

Effect: Tikar Urchinpad Support Benefit.name: Effect: Tikar Urchinpad Support Benefit
Effect: Tikar Urchinpad Support Benefit.description:
Granted by @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-animal-companions.AC-Support.Item.TFrCa4aCUKtwhuqn]{Tikar Urchinpad Support Benefit}

As long as you're adjacent to your urchinpad, if you attempt to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.7blmbDrQFNfdT731]{Shove} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.ge56Lu1xXVFYUnLP]{Trip} an opponent and roll a critical failure, you get a failure instead.

Effect: Triceratops Support Benefit.name: 效果：三角龙-支援增益 Triceratops Support Benefit
Effect: Triceratops Support Benefit.description:
受@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-animal-companions.AC-Support.Item.TDMhLC16cQOYBbmA]影响

你对三角龙触及范围内倒地生物打击造成伤害时，还将造成持续流血伤害。

受@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-animal-companions.AC-Support.Item.XrxIRaD1A5tpKm1t]影响

如果你命中并对你暴龙触及范围内的生物造成伤害，该生物会陷入@Compendium[pf2e.conditionitems.Frightened]{惊惧 Frightened 1}。
Effect: Tyrannosaurus Support Benefit.name: 效果：暴龙-支援增益 Tyrannosaurus Support Benefit

Effect: Ulgrem-Lurann Support Benefit.description:
Granted by @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-animal-companions.AC-Support.Item.uZLtEOimbFnEDUKh]{Ulgrem-Lurann Support Benefit}

Each time you hit a creature in the Ulgrem-Lurann's reach with a Strike, the creature takes an additional piercing and electricity damage from the Ulgrem-Lurann.
Effect: Ulgrem-Lurann Support Benefit.name: Effect: Ulgrem-Lurann Support Benefit

受@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-animal-companions.AC-Support.Item.imNJpD4afn4UrLpu]影响

每次你以打击命中不死手掌触及范围内的生物时，该生物会受到来自于不死手掌的额外钝击伤害。
Effect: Undead Hand Support Benefit.name: 效果：不死手掌-支援增益 Undead Hand Support Benefit

Granted by @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-animal-companions.AC-Support.Item.3jZOVJsYwBQ7GPDi]{Vampiric Animal Support Benefit}

Your Strikes that damage a creature in your vampiric animal's reach also deal bleed damage.

Effect: War Pig Support Benefit.name: 效果：战猪-支援增益 War Pig Support Benefit
Effect: War Pig Support Benefit.description:
受@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-animal-companions.AC-Support.Item.ZGE7RQKqjQCTEJct]影响

你对战猪触及范围内生物打击造成伤害时，会使目标陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 Clumsy 1}

Effect: Water Elemental Support Benefit.name: 效果：水元素-支援增益 Water Elemental Support Benefit
Effect: Water Elemental Support Benefit.description:
受@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-animal-companions.AC-Support.Item.BFvS1wnFxgUqgX8m]影响

当你进行的打击命中并对你水元素触及范围内的生物造成伤害时，该生物会陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 Clumsy 1}。

Effect: Water Wraith Support Benefit.description:
受@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-animal-companions.AC-Support.Item.IUXX1lUd9kMzV4bq]影响

每次你以打击命中你水缚灵触及范围内的生物时，该生物会陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]。

受@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-animal-companions.AC-Support.Item.KomM6mTwJAzvqAgi]影响

其速度承受–5尺状态减值（重击时为–10尺）。

Effect: Zombie Carrion Bird Support Bene.name: 效果：丧尸食腐鸟-支援增益 Zombie Carrion Bird Support Benefit

Effect: Air Elemental Support Benefit.description:
受@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-animal-companions.AC-Support.Item.aMFtyZ3QNQkduwqR]影响

如果你以打击命中并对你气元素触及范围内的生物造成伤害，直到你的下一回合开始，你对该生物处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]。

Effect: Bacallia Support Benefit.description:
受@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-animal-companions.AC-Support.Item.ZQZD767JGaTcOfWd]影响

你以打击对你巴卡利亚兽触及范围内生物造成伤害时，该生物会陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]。

Effect: Berserker Follower Ability.name: Effect: Berserker Follower Ability
Effect: Berserker Follower Ability.description: You gain a status bonus to your next damage roll.

Effect: Cragstone Bear Support Benefit.name: 效果：峭壁岩熊-支援增益 Cragstone Bear Support Benefit
Effect: Cragstone Bear Support Benefit.description:
受@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-animal-companions.AC-Support.Item.6dStcNwpIK7WeAeo]影响

如果你的峭壁岩熊与你相邻，你的 AC 获得环境加值。

Effect: Elephant Support Benefit.name: 效果：大象-支援增益 Elephant Support Benefit
Effect: Elephant Support Benefit.description:
Granted by @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-animal-companions.AC-Support.Item.r7QN2lUVWXlcynMW]{Elephant Support Benefit}

Targets within your elephant's reach that you hit and deal damage to before the start of your next turn take a –4 status penalty to purely auditory Perception checks

Effect: Elephant Support Benefit (Penalt.description:
受@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-animal-companions.AC-Support.Item.r7QN2lUVWXlcynMW]影响

你在听觉的察觉检定上承受-4状态减值。

Effect: Elk Support Benefit.name: 效果：麋鹿-支援增益 Elk Support Benefit
Effect: Elk Support Benefit.description:
Granted by @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-animal-companions.AC-Support.Item.60lThr6OM9zZtqK2]{Elk Support Benefit}

If you hit and deal damage to a creature within your elk's reach, the creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}.

Effect: Experienced Sharpshooter.name: 效果：老练射手 Experienced Sharpshooter
Effect: Experienced Sharpshooter.description: 你的速度承受–5尺环境减值，如果攻击是重击则承受–10尺环境减值。

Effect: Fire Elemental Support Benefit.name: 效果：火元素-支援增益 Fire Elemental Support Benefit
Effect: Fire Elemental Support Benefit.description:
受@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-animal-companions.AC-Support.Item.NSdcXgEHVHdfJlkb]影响

你对火元素触及范围内生物造成伤害的打击还将造成持续火焰伤害。

Effect: Flying Squirrel Support Benefit.name: 效果：飞鼠-支援增益 Flying Squirrel Support Benefit
Effect: Flying Squirrel Support Benefit.description:
受@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-animal-companions.AC-Support.Item.V2kspaYOoLbHV5vb]影响

如果你打击并对你巨飞鼠触及范围内的生物造成伤害，该生物的速度承受–10尺环境减值。

Effect: Giant Rock Tuatara Support Benef.name: Effect: Giant Rock Tuatara Support Benefit
Effect: Giant Rock Tuatara Support Benef.description:
Granted by @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-animal-companions.AC-Support.Item.BgqGqrzRNnm8QaN9]{Giant Rock Tuatara Support}

Creatures within your giant rock tuatara's reach that you damage with your Strikes are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1}.

Effect: Giant Wasp Support Benefit.name: Effect: Giant Wasp Support Benefit
Effect: Giant Wasp Support Benefit.description:
Granted by @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-animal-companions.AC-Support.Item.V3XczB8r8fQfJIhe]{Giant Wasp Support Benefit}

if you hit and deal damage to a creature in your giant wasp's reach, the creature becomes Frightened 1.

Effect: Giraffe Support Benefit.name: Effect: Giraffe Support Benefit
Effect: Giraffe Support Benefit.description:
Granted by @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-animal-companions.AC-Support.Item.LcAJTLzLDcIrQ7KQ]{Giraffe Support Benefit}

Any target you successfully Shove moves 10 feet (15 feet on a critical success).

Effect: Gray Bladeling Support Benefit.name: Effect: Gray Bladeling Support Benefit
Effect: Gray Bladeling Support Benefit.description:
Granted by @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-animal-companions.AC-Support.Item.XDmtg6o5B2MaA4Ke]{Gray Bladeling Support Benefit}

Your Strikes that damage a creature in your gray bladeling's reach also deal bleed damage or becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1} if it's already taking persistent bleed damage.

Effect: Griffon Support Benefit.name: Effect: Griffon Support Benefit
Effect: Griffon Support Benefit.description:
Granted by @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-animal-companions.AC-Support.Item.ShKTegi69Hizn0vB]{Griffon Support Benefit}

Your gain a +2 circumstance bonus to saves against emotion effects.

Effect: Hermit Krait Support Benefit.name: 效果：隐蛇-支援增益 Hermit Krait Support Benefit
Effect: Hermit Krait Support Benefit.description:
受@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-animal-companions.AC-Support.Item.u9jaNQk6QF2Tm8oe]影响

你对隐蛇触及范围内的生物打击造成伤害时，还将造成持续毒素伤害。

Effect: Hippocampus Support Benefit.name: 效果：海驹-支援增益 Hippocampus Support Benefit
Effect: Hippocampus Support Benefit.description:
受@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-animal-companions.AC-Support.Item.t1KMf7rDzJJ2vWhe]影响

如果你骑在海驹上并在近战打击前的行动中移动了10尺或更多，这次打击的伤害增加一个等于两倍武器伤害骰数量的环境加值。

Effect: Hippogriff Support Benefit.name: Effect: Hippogriff Support Benefit
Effect: Hippogriff Support Benefit.description:
Granted by @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-animal-companions.AC-Support.Item.cJBAKsVacLTIiPcz]{Hippogriff Support Benefit}

If you're mounted on your hippogriff and moved 10 feet or more on the action before a melee Strike, you gain a circumstance bonus to damage for a Strike equal to twice the number of weapon damage dice.

Effect: Horse Support Benefit.name: Effect: Horse Support Benefit
Effect: Horse Support Benefit.description:
Granted by @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-animal-companions.AC-Support.Item.wf20kx6pPGBWwUn2]{Horse Support Benefit}

If you're mounted on your horse and moved 10 feet or more on the action before a melee Strike, you gain a circumstance bonus to damage for a Strike equal to twice the number of weapon damage dice.

Effect: Keulia Support Benefit.name: Effect: Keulia Support Benefit
Effect: Keulia Support Benefit.description:
Granted by @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-animal-companions.AC-Support.Item.IsdduEnR9bFi2vDS]{Keulia Support Benefit}

Your Strikes that damage a creature in your Keulia's reach also deal bludgeoning damage.

Effect: Metal Elemental Support Benefit.name: 效果：金元素-支援增益 Metal Elemental Support Benefit
Effect: Metal Elemental Support Benefit.description:
受@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-animal-companions.AC-Support.Item.SZD1hU2ageIDw4To]影响

你对金元素触及范围内生物造成伤害的打击还将造成持续流血伤害。

Effect: Mole Support Benefit.name: 效果：鼹鼠-支援增益 Mole Support Benefit
Effect: Mole Support Benefit.description:
受@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-animal-companions.AC-Support.Item.vvuB2kEzRYSs4IpH]影响

如果你命中并对与鼹鼠相邻的生物造成伤害，直到该生物离开当前位置否则其为笨拙1。

Effect: Mongoose Support Benefit.name: 效果：猫鼬-支援增益 Mongoose Support Benefit
Effect: Mongoose Support Benefit.description:
受@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-animal-companions.AC-Support.Item.vvuB2kEzRYSs4IpH]影响

与猫鼬相邻的生物无法对你进行夹击

Effect: Monitor Lizard Support Benefit.name: Effect: Monitor Lizard Support Benefit
Effect: Monitor Lizard Support Benefit.description:
Granted by @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-animal-companions.AC-Support.Item.2Jaz98WiQMNnqKCD]{Monitor Lizard Support Benefit}

If your Strike damages a foe, any time the foe attempts an action with the manipulate trait until the end of your next turn, it must attempt a DC 5 Flat Check. On a failure, the action is disrupted.

Effect: Moth Support Benefit.name: 效果：飞蛾-支援增益 Moth Support Benefit
Effect: Moth Support Benefit.description:
受@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-animal-companions.AC-Support.Item.9Y5QKMvy0KsliE29]影响

如果你以打击伤害一个对你隐蔽或藏匿、且位于飞蛾触及范围内的敌人，则命中隐蔽生物的纯骰检定DC仅为3，命中藏匿敌人的纯骰检定DC仅为9。

Effect: Rhinoceros Support Benefit.name: 效果：犀牛-支援增益 Rhinoceros Support Benefit
Effect: Rhinoceros Support Benefit.description:
受@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-animal-companions.AC-Support.Item.kecawjDhBFz5QA4f]影响

在你的下回合开始前，犀牛触及范围内第一只被你击中且伤害的生物会陷入笨拙 1。

Effect: Riding Dragonet Support Benefit.name: 效果：骑乘微龙-支援增益 Riding Dragonet Support Benefit
Effect: Riding Dragonet Support Benefit.description:
受@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-animal-companions.AC-Support.Item.6Lz6bY8gEEXzNnm7]影响

你打击微龙的触及范围内的生物时还会造成钝击伤害。

Effect: Riding Drake Support Benefit.name: 效果：骑乘龙兽-支援增益 Riding Drake Support Benefit
Effect: Riding Drake Support Benefit.description:
受@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-animal-companions.AC-Support.Item.C41lCXjerYjMyOTI]影响

每次你骑乘龙兽进行打击并命中龙兽触及范围内的生物时，该生物会受到来自于龙兽的火焰伤害。

Effect: Riding Tarantula Support Benefit.name: Effect: Riding Tarantula Support Benefit
Effect: Riding Tarantula Support Benefit.description:
Granted by @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-animal-companions.AC-Support.Item.NKgFIZQYkL3bb6xn]{Riding Tarantula Support Benefit}

If you hit and deal damage to a creature your riding tarantula threatens, the target must succeed at a @Check[type:flat|dc:5] whenever it takes a concentrate action or that action is lost.

Effect: Scorpion Support Benefit.name: 效果：蝎子-支援增益 Scorpion Support Benefit
Effect: Scorpion Support Benefit.description:
受@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-animal-companions.AC-Support.Item.xtXdDC5KrUqh7eCu]影响

你对蝎子触及范围内生物的打击造成伤害时，还将造成持续毒素伤害。

Effect: Severed Head Support Benefit.name: 效果：断头-支援增益 Severed Head Support Benefit
Effect: Severed Head Support Benefit.description:
受@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-animal-companions.AC-Support.Item.z6bNmmf5YiJrPbot]影响

你对断头触及范围内生物造成伤害的打击会使它们的速度承受减值，且在使用反应动作时必须通过一次纯骰检定。

Effect: Severed Head Support Benefit (Pe.name: Effect: Severed Head Support Benefit (Penalty)
Effect: Severed Head Support Benefit (Pe.description:
Granted by @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-animal-companions.AC-Support.Item.z6bNmmf5YiJrPbot]{Severed Head Support Benefit}

You take a -5-foot status penalty to your Speeds and must succeed at a DC 5 flat check to use reactions triggered by the origin's actions.

Effect: Shadow Hound Support Benefit.description:
受@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-animal-companions.AC-Support.Item.h65iGxPkfrT8DdPv]影响

当你以打击伤害一名生物且该生物处于你暗影猎犬的触及范围内时，你和你的暗影猎犬对该生物都处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]。
Effect: Shadow Hound Support Benefit.name: 效果：暗影猎犬-支援增益 Shadow Hound Support Benefit

Effect: Sundaflora Support Benefit.name: 效果：太阳花-支援增益 Sundaflora Support Benefit
Effect: Sundaflora Support Benefit.description:
受@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-animal-companions.AC-Support.Item.xpEAKxiQUlUXkqV4]影响

你对太阳花触及范围内的敌人进行打击时，你的下一次攻击掷骰获得+1环境加值。

Effect: Terror Bird Support Benefit.name: 效果：恐鸟-支援增益 Terror Bird Support Benefit
Effect: Terror Bird Support Benefit.description:
受@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-animal-companions.AC-Support.Item.oLwBrrW33fIjSHLr]影响

你对恐鸟触及范围内生物造成伤害的打击会使目标陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]。

Effect: Wolf Support Benefit.name: Effect: Wolf Support Benefit
Effect: Wolf Support Benefit.description:
Granted by @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-animal-companions.AC-Support.Item.5HnWXmOp8qNjfhdU]{Wolf Support Benefit}

Your Strikes that damage creatures your wolf threatens give the target a –5-foot status penalty to its Speeds (–10 on a critical success).

Effect: Wolf Support Benefit Speed Penal.name: 效果：狼-支援增益 速度减值 Wolf Support Benefit Speed Penalty
Effect: Wolf Support Benefit Speed Penal.description:
受@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-animal-companions.AC-Support.Item.5HnWXmOp8qNjfhdU]影响

其速度承受–5尺状态减值（重击时为–10尺）。

Effect: Umbrella Mushroom Support Benefi.name: 效果：伞菇-支援增益 Umbrella Mushroom Support Benefit
Effect: Umbrella Mushroom Support Benefi.description:
受@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-animal-companions.AC-Support.Item.XVOVZjvTwaoalpWC]影响

你对伞菇触及范围内生物造成伤害的打击会使目标陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{呆滞 Stupefied 1}。此效果具有毒素特征。

Effect: Wood Elemental Support Benefit.name: Effect: Wood Elemental Support Benefit
Effect: Wood Elemental Support Benefit.description:
Granted by @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-animal-companions.AC-Support.Item.KomM6mTwJAzvqAgi]{Wood Elemental Support Benefit}

If you hit with a Strike that deals damage to a creature in your wood elemental's reach, the creature takes a –5-foot circumstance penalty to its Speeds for 1 minute (–10 on a critical success).

Effect: Zombie Mount Support Benefit.name: 效果：丧尸坐骑-支援增益 Zombie Mount Support Benefit
Effect: Zombie Mount Support Benefit.description:
受@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-animal-companions.AC-Support.Item.N9fYaUuIgD6RQ7CY]影响

每当你在骑乘丧尸坐骑时打击并命中丧尸坐骑触及范围内的敌人时，该生物会受到来自于丧尸坐骑的额外伤害。

Effect: Zombie Support Benefit.name: Effect: Zombie Support Benefit
Effect: Zombie Support Benefit.description:
Granted by @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-animal-companions.AC-Support.Item.yAYlM3aIRYnqx6j8]{Zombie Support Benefit}

Each time you hit a creature that's within 10 feet of the zombie and you deal damage, the creature takes an additional damage as the wound festers.

Effect: Isgeri Boarhound Support Benefit.name: Effect: Isgeri Boarhound Support Benefit
Effect: Isgeri Boarhound Support Benefit.description:
Granted by @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-animal-companions.AC-Support.Item.OQnyw05StojLRcA0]{Isgeri Boarhound Support Benefit}

You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to your next attack roll to Strike a foe within your boarhound's reach.

If you damage a creature with the trait corresponding to your boarhound's designated foe with that Strike, the creature takes additional d6 piercing damage.
